## Summary
The code in src/dedupe.py has a time complexity of O(n^2) due to nested loops and can be improved to O(n) using a set to keep track of seen items. The current implementation can be optimized for better performance and readability.

## Performance Observations
The existing implementation in src/dedupe.py has a time complexity of O(n^2) due to nested loops, which can be improved to O(n) using a set to keep track of seen items.
